input.hypothesis: score_queries is collapsing composite scores because the prompt does not anchor the 1-10 scale to concrete volume/KD bands; adding explicit banding guidance should restore score spread.
input.diff:
--- a/skills/prompts/score_queries.md
+++ b/skills/prompts/score_queries.md
@@
-Score each query 1-10.
+Score each query 1-10, anchored to these bands: volume <100 -> 1-3, 100-1k -> 4-6, >1k -> 7-10.
input.predicted_effect: composite score variance returns to its prior-week distribution; BriefSpecificityJudge pass-rate recovers on B2B SaaS cases.
